---
title: "Reflection"
---

## Skills and Knowledge Acquired

*[Reflect on the technical skills you developed throughout this module: Git version control, Quarto website creation, HTML/CSS/Sass theming, Python programming, SQL queries, and data visualisation. What was new to you? What did you find most valuable?]*

## Challenges and Solutions

*[Discuss the challenges you encountered during the development of this ePortfolio and how you overcame them. Consider technical difficulties, design decisions, and time management.]*

## Connection to Professional Goals

*[How do the skills acquired in this module align with your career aspirations in business and finance? How might you apply these skills in a professional context?]*

## Future Learning Goals

*[What areas would you like to explore further? Consider advanced data analysis techniques, web development, or other technical skills that complement your professional development.]*
